title: Vanilla Enhanced+
description: The Ultimate Client Side Modpack optimized for servers
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b9ee2d18f311d1353812b2e89e85b7dc99bb60a.png) _

Vanilla Minecraft, But Better

_ ##

Features

- ⚙️Add and drop feature allowing you to quickly and easily add and remove mods - 💻Client side and optimized for servers - 📈Plenty of optimization - 👌🏽Endless quality of life features - 🗺️Mini map and World map - 📷Freecam - 🧹Inventory management tools - 🕶️Configurable shaders - 🫂Ability to host free worlds locally and have your friends join from anywhere! - 🛠️Creative building tools (single player world only) - 🎙️Proximity voice chat (must be installed on server side as well) - 🌐And Much Much More!
Modlist ## Mods that have Significant/Noticeable Changes Please note: Any of these mods can easily be disabled if you do not want the features they offer. Also, everything works on servers unless otherwise stated. ### Quality of Life Mods: - **Tons of optimization** - _Sodium, Dynamic FPS, Entity culling, ETC._ - **Appleskin** - _Adds various food-related HUD improvements._ - **Better 3rd person** - _Adds advanced 3rd person camera movements._ - **Better Statistics screen** - _Improves the vanilla statistics menu._ - **Better F3** - _Improves the vanilla F3 menu._ - **Detailed Armor** - _Adds a more detailed armor bar above your hearts._ - **Fast Trading** - _Adds a button to automatically trade stacks of items to villagers._ - **First person model** - _Adds the player model to the first person POV._ - **Freecam** - _Allows you to detach your camera from your body and fly around (Hypixel will kick you if you use this)._ - **Inventive Inventory** - _Adds many quality of life inventory management tools._ - **Essentials** - _Adds many quality of life features including the ability to host free worlds locally and have your friends join from anywhere! (Disable this if your computer is laggy)._ - **InvMove** - _Allows you to move while in inventories._ - **Physics Mod** - _Adds realistic vanilla-friendly physics._ - **Shulker box tooltips** - _Allows you to see what is in shulker boxes without placing them._ - **Simple Shulker Preview** - _Displays a configurable icon showing what’s in a Shulker box._ - **Resourcify** - _Adds a menu where you can install shaders and resource packs from the internet in Minecraft._ - **Simple voice chat** - _Adds proximity voice chat (must be installed on server)._ - **Xaero’s Minimap** - _Adds a configurable minimap._ - **Xaero’s World Map** - _Adds a configurable world map._ - **Zoomify** - _Allows you to easily zoom in similar to a spyglass._ - **Calc mod** - _Adds a calculator in chat `/calc`._ ### Creative Building Tools: - **Axiom** - _Adds an editing tool that simplifies building similar to world edit (Must be installed on server)._ - **World Edit** - _You should know what this is (must be installed on server)._ - **Litematica** - _Adds the ability to copy and paste schematics into worlds and on servers._ ### Shaders: - **Complementary Reimagined** - **Complementary Unbound**
Attributions: This modpack includes a vanillatweaks resource pack https://vanillatweaks.net/
